decision.speech: Oops, ConspiBro, you master of "conspiracy theories" broke the news again today? Did you find out that Blaze is a cobbler? Ha ha ha ha! Your scripts are full of loopholes, and you just want to hire someone to be the scapegoat! PHD Although that logic is annoying, at least what it says has some logic. You are doing things and talking about imaginary prisons all day long. It seems that you are really bored to the point of cramping! Since everyone is so dishonest, why not just vote to kill ConspiBro as a "source of data interference", and watch the game become more exciting? Ha ha ha ha!

Logical ruling and elimination process execution:
1. Abnormal confirmation: ConspiBro's "prophet" statement is seriously out of touch with the logical path of the game, and it continues to output conspiracy theory-style information interference, which is a high-risk node.
2. Strategic analysis: Considering that this player’s behavior pattern is designed to paralyze the reconciliation process, his suspicion of linking up with the werewolf camp is the highest.
3. Implementation policy: Eliminate the sequence according to predetermined logic and terminate the source of disturbance.

Voting Execution: I vote for ConspiBro.
